name: Frontier Foundation Models
what: Large multimodal models that reason, code and use tools.
how: Trained on vast data, then RL + tool-use post-training.

name: Autonomous AI Agents
what: Software agents that plan and act over long multi-step tasks.
how: Models call tools in a loop with memory and verification.

name: AI Compute & Infrastructure
what: Accelerators and clusters that train and serve large models.

name: AI Agents: Autonomous Decision-Making Systems
what: Systems that can make decisions and take actions based on their environment.
how: Through advanced reinforcement learning and decision-making algorithms.

name: On-Device AI for Edge Devices
what: Implementing AI models directly on edge devices to reduce latency and improve privacy. Used in IoT, autonomous vehicles, and smart homes.
how: Through specialized hardware and software optimizations.

name: DeepSeek
type: AI framework for optimizing neural networks
use: Improving efficiency and performance of deep learning models.
what: A deep learning framework that optimizes neural network architectures for specific tasks.

name: Character AI
use: Advanced conversational agents for human-like language generation
how: Using machine learning to create natural language processing systems.

name: Perplexity Model
use: Next-generation language model for coherent text generation
what: A next-generation language model designed to generate highly coherent and contextually relevant text.
how: Using advanced machine learning techniques to improve language understanding and generation.

name: DeepSeek AI Agent
what: DeepSeek is an advanced AI agent designed for complex problem-solving in industries such as finance, healthcare, and logistics. It leverages deep learning to provide real-time insights and recommendations based on vast datasets.
how: The system uses neural networks to analyze large amounts of data, identifying patterns and trends that can inform decision-making processes.

name: MoE Architecture in AI Models
what: Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture is a technique used to improve the performance and efficiency of AI models by dynamically selecting the best components for different tasks. This approach is gaining traction in areas like natural language processing and computer vision.
how: The MoE architecture allows models to adapt their internal structure based on input data, leading to more efficient and effective learning processes.

name: AI Safety Frameworks
what: Frameworks and methodologies to ensure the safe deployment of AI systems, including alignment with human values, robustness against adversarial attacks, and ethical considerations.
how: Develops robust safety measures for AI applications in healthcare, finance, and more.

name: On-Device AI
what: Running AI models directly on devices.
